name: Bridge
description: Stablecoin infrastructure and APIs for developers enabling fiat/stablecoin payment flows and issuing.

seo.title: Bridge — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Bridge: Stablecoin infrastructure and APIs for developers enabling fiat/stablecoin payment flows and issuing.

when_to_use: Issuing USDC/USDT stablecoins for developer-built payment flows
Fiat-to-stablecoin conversion API for remittance and payments products
Cross-border B2B settlement using stablecoin rails to avoid SWIFT
Stablecoin orchestration layer for wallets, exchanges, and fintech apps

review.verdict: Post-Stripe acquisition, Bridge is the most credible stablecoin payments API for developers today.
review.best_for: Fintechs building stablecoin payout, settlement, or issuing products
review.not_for: Merchants needing traditional card acceptance with no stablecoin story
